EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" changed query folder "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" created query folder "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" assigned privileges to query folder "{object.storage.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" deleted query folder "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
